title: Foundation and architecture
reflection: Built evolution log, temperament colors, visible motes/bonds, phase-tinted sky, breathing pulse, cluster glow, soul-rise death, eclipse/aurora effects, narrative text. Refactored 922-line main.ts into 25-file layered DAG.
looking_ahead: Biome-specific sound, dramatic death particles, weather rendering
Event permanence: crater tiles, waterlogged terrain
Deeper mote personality through shape and movement
note: Compressed from 7 entries (Mar 2-5). Original entries preserved in git history.

title: First agent day
reflection: Specialized agents launched. Death got 4-phase particles, biomes got unique sounds/vegetation/fog, sky learned solar arc, narrative became phase-aware with anticipation windows, cinematic post-processing added. Bond arcs, wanderer trails, cluster territories, screen-space bloom pass.
note: Compressed from 11 entries across 5 agents. Original entries preserved in git history.

title: Character and atmosphere
reflection: Bond breaks got sound/shards, ambient beds became phase-reactive, water reflects sky, desert heat haze added. Biome-voiced narrative, first-hearth milestone. Hardy motes got blocky shape, wanderers lean into movement. Three death styles per temperament. Tundra aurora, ash fall, biome clouds. Death inheritance and grief. Phase mood through colored vignette.
looking_ahead: God rays, shooting stars, volcanic smoke
note: Compressed from 12 entries across 5 agents. Original entries preserved in git history.

title: Polish and spectacle
reflection: Cluster mourning communities, chorus awakening with desert shimmer. God rays, shooting stars, volcanic smoke, rain puddles. Biome-specific narrative voice and memory. Ghost paths for wanderers, elder mass. Eclipse crown, shockwave transitions, bond flash, memory constellation. Biome skies/storms/shapes. Three ending beats in narrative. Bond break biome dissolution sounds.
looking_ahead: Cluster merge chord and mourning chorus in sound
note: Compressed from 10 entries across 5 agents. Original entries preserved in git history.

title: Cluster merge flash, mourning gradient
reflection: Cluster merges get expanding color wave (inner white ring, outer colored ring). Mourning now reflects bond depth: direct partners grieve at full intensity, peripheral members at 55%.
looking_ahead: Wanderer death trail length-scaling by age

title: Cluster merge chord, mourning chorus, lush last bloom
reflection: Cluster merges get biome-voiced ascending arpeggios. 2+ mourning motes trigger communal chord. Lush gets major-7th last bloom. Desert bond-breaks leave 5th harmonic overtone. Tundra beds drop to 12% in dissolution.
looking_ahead: Cluster merge cascade audio for 8+ clusters
Lush bloom event interleave with silence

title: Mist, embers, ice, caldera and fjord
reflection: Two new archetypes: caldera (volcanic bowl with rim peaks flanking lava lake) and fjord (tundra plateau with deep water channels). Water exhales mist at dawn/dusk. Lava breathes ember sparks. Tundra water ices over at genesis and silence.

title: Biome voice, third silence beat, grand cluster, first bond
reflection: Event anticipation speaks biome language. First bond text is biome-specific. Named clusters that peaked at 6+ earn grander language. Silence now has three beats with biome-specific final word.
looking_ahead: Named cluster callback with member loss

title: Biome color grade, last light, chromatic aberration, cinema bars
reflection: Phase color grading 2x stronger with per-biome correction. Last-light spotlight dims world around final 1-3 motes. Phase transitions get chromatic aberration. Event messages get letterbox bars.
looking_ahead: Biome color grade bloom-in at genesis

title: Named silence, elder trails
reflection: Silence constellation carries each mote's hue identity (55% recent, 15% oldest). Elder wanderers leave longer ghost paths scaled by age (10-30 breadcrumbs, 3-6s lifetime).

title: Dying makes a story
reflection: Dying wanderers leave red-hot trails — their final run blazes. Social motes with bonds walk toward partners before dying. Stressed bonds glow urgent orange-white.
looking_ahead: Cluster merge cascade at 8+ cluster members
Bond age visualization — old bonds glow warmer
Audio for social death walk and wanderer frenzy
visual_verification: dissolution-start shows warm bond lines glowing between final survivors; silence-start has 3-4 motes with visible bond connections. Red trails visible on fast-moving wanderers.
quality_delta: mote brightness 0.51 → 0.50 (seed variation only, not from changes)

title: Bond age colors
reflection: Bonds now age visually: fresh bonds are cool blue-white, proven bonds warm to amber-gold, ancient bonds earn an outer glow. Mote brightness floor raised.
looking_ahead: Audio cue when ancient bond breaks (loss of long relationship)
Bond age pulse rate slows as bond ages (old bonds breathe slowly)
visual_verification: Dissolution phase shows warm amber bond lines between long-bonded motes. Newly formed bonds appear as cool blue-white lines that fade to mote colors. Motes visibly brighter against terrain.

title: cluster ground glow
reflection: Clusters now cast warm campfire light on the terrain below them. Phase-scaled: bright amber at complexity, dim at silence. Pairs (2+ motes) now earn the identity ring.
looking_ahead: Star field visible in genesis/silence for night atmosphere
Stronger phase sky contrast between genesis night and complexity day
Mote curiosity — facing toward nearest unbonded neighbor
Water reflection intensity tracking sky brightness by phase
visual_verification: After screenshot shows warm amber-orange elliptical glow on terrain beneath active clusters. 2-member cluster ring appears in exploration phase. Phase-scaling visible: strong glow in dissolution/complexity, reduced in silence.
quality_delta: Visible motes 6.4 -> 15.1 avg (timing variance + improved brightness). No regressions.

title: Stars and day arc
reflection: Genesis and silence now have a star field (140 stars, 3 types). Sky tints deepened so night phases read as night. Sunrise band warms the lower sky during exploration.
looking_ahead: Audio cue when ancient bond breaks
visual_verification: SILENCE phase shows deep blue-indigo sky with clearly scattered star dots. Exploration shows warm amber-golden lower sky sunrise band. Night phases unmistakably dark vs warm golden complexity.
quality_delta: No quality regressions. Star pixels picked up as motes by analyzer (benign). Sky tints: genesis -8,-8,+15 -> -22,-18,+30; silence -5,-10,+12 -> -18,-22,+35.
